overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza and underpass during golden hour. The scene features neon-lit commercial buildings, cyberpunk architecture with elevated walkways, and transitions between open plazas and covered underpass areas with graffiti.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial plaza with neon storefront

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza past the 24/7 store and neon benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gold jacket walking past camera
pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: blue storefront with bright cyan neon signage reading 24/7 STORE
futuristic benches with pink neon underlighting
tall cylindrical tower with red and white spiral pattern
exterior staircase with teal and yellow railings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic commercial plaza during golden hour. The camera moves past a 24/7 store with bright cyan neon signage and futuristic benches with pink underlighting. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the camera approaches a teal staircase structure and elevated walkway.

events.description: moves from open plaza into covered underpass beneath the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway beneath the elevated structures

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind illuminated red food cart with blue neon

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and spray paint tags
red food cart with blue neon lighting and vendor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered underpass beneath the elevated structures, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. A graffiti-covered wall appears on the left, and a food vendor with a neon-lit cart is visible. The spiral tower remains visible in the background through the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass corner with graffiti walls and vendor

events.description: turns corner and encounters bright sunlight streaming into the underpass from the exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass corner and turning toward the sunlit exit

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground against concrete wall with belongings

entered.detail: person sitting on ground with bags and items scattered against the wall
distant skyscrapers visible through the underpass exit

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the underpass, the camera passes the food vendor and approaches a corner where a homeless person sits against the wall. Sunlight begins streaming in from an exit ahead, illuminating the graffiti-covered walls as the city skyline becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit overlook with view of downtown skyline

events.description: steps into direct sunlight with full view of the city skyline and sunset
turns away from the skyline view back toward the underpass

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the sunset skyline then turning back into the shadows

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the bright sun
tall glass and steel buildings in the downtown district
curved elevated roadway structure with vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into bright direct sunlight, revealing a stunning view of the downtown skyline with palm trees silhouetted against the golden hour sun. After observing the view, the camera turns back toward the shaded underpass, leaving the open overlook.

events.description: re-enters the shaded underpass from the sunlit area

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass toward the market area with concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking near the staircase and market area

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to upper level
yellow umbrella shading a market stall at the base of stairs
tunnel entrance with red and cyan neon lighting and red foliage
concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags reappearing on the left

segments.scene_description: Returning to the shaded underpass, the camera moves toward a concrete staircase with a yellow market umbrella at its base. The graffiti wall reappears on the left while pedestrians move through the area. In the distance, a tunnel entrance glows with red and cyan neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant commercial plaza through a shaded urban underpass and out toward a sun-drenched city skyline. It begins by gliding past a 24/7 store with cyan neon signage and pink-lit benches, moving through a crowd of pedestrians toward a teal staircase and elevated walkway. As the camera enters the covered underpass, the natural golden hour light shifts to artificial tones, passing a graffiti-covered wall and a neon-lit food vendor while a spiral tower remains visible in the distance. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the shadows into bright direct sunlight, revealing a silhouette of palm trees against the downtown skyline before turning back into the shaded concrete corridor. Finally, the camera moves past a yellow market umbrella and returning graffiti toward a distant tunnel entrance glowing with red and cyan neon lighting.
